action.reasoning: Observation: current best is 0.1965 from a 5-checkpoint weighted ensemble with center/full plus flip TTA; adding diverse weak checkpoints helped, and there are still 7 iterations with ample time. Analysis: Quickdraw/sketch drawings have small pose/stroke-placement variation, so deterministic mild rotation TTA may improve robustness more than further training, and prediction-time changes are reversible if they underperform. Decision: patch predict.py to add deterministic ±5° rotation views, create an 8-view manifest using the current best 5-model weights, and submit it for evaluation.
